title: posoqueria coriacea subsp. formosa
intro: Posoqueria coriacea subsp. formosa, also known as the Formosa Posoqueria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in South America, where its leaves and stems are valued for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Posoqueria coriacea subsp. formosa include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies to treat various ailments.
